evidence_requirements.name: Release files agree
evidence_requirements.pass_criteria: Version, changelog, release process, and README describe the same release intent.

evidence_requirements.name: Bundle manifest agrees
evidence_requirements.pass_criteria: Every included file exists and planned work stays planned.

evidence_requirements.name: Project Memory agrees
evidence_requirements.pass_criteria: Recovery state points to the current public release and next scoped work.

evidence_requirements.name: Public branch list agrees
evidence_requirements.pass_criteria: The public repository exposes only main after merged release branches are deleted.

evidence_requirements.name: No excluded scope entered release
evidence_requirements.pass_criteria: CLI, installer, runtime, workflow engine, MCP integration, and release automation stay excluded unless explicitly selected.
